findings.text: NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 contain an email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 with an attached file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The extracted text does not contain the binary content of the embedded Student Licence PDF. A binary extraction tool is required to extract the PDF from the source files.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Binary Extraction Result

**Task:** Binary extraction of embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029

**Status:** Extracted text confirms the attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB) exists in both source files. Binary extraction was not performed in this task; the extracted text only shows the email metadata and body, not the embedded PDF binary.

**Next Step:** Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., `pdfdetach`, `mutool`, or custom script) to extract the embedded PDF from the source files NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029.
proposed_artifacts.title: Binary extraction result for Student Licence PDF

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, mutool, or custom script) to extract the embedded PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from the source files NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029. The extracted text confirms the attachment exists but does not contain the binary data. Extract the PDF and save it as a candidate artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Binary extraction of embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 using binary tool

summary: Extracted text from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 shows an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra dated 12/03/2026 with an attached file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The extracted text does not contain the binary content of the embedded PDF. A binary extraction tool is required to extract the Student Licence PDF from the source PDF files. No binary extraction was performed in this task; the extracted text confirms the attachment exists but cannot extract it.

uncertainties.description: The binary content of the embedded Student Licence PDF was not extracted in this task. The extracted text only confirms the attachment exists but cannot extract the PDF binary data.
